name: qvsview-qs
description: Qlik Sense extension for viewing load scripts with syntax highlighting
author: Göran Sander, Ptarmigan Labs

scripts.build: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=development nebula build --config nebula.config.cjs --sourcemap false --mode development
scripts.build:dist: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production nebula build --config nebula.config.cjs --sourcemap false
scripts.pack:dev: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=development BUILD_VARIANT=light npm run build && npm run sense && cross-env BUILD_TYPE=development BUILD_VARIANT=light npm run post-build && npm run generate-pdf && npm run zip
scripts.pack:dev:airgap: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=development BUILD_VARIANT=full npm run build && npm run sense && cross-env BUILD_TYPE=development BUILD_VARIANT=full npm run post-build && npm run generate-pdf && npm run zip
scripts.pack:prod: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production BUILD_VARIANT=light npm run build:dist && cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production BUILD_VARIANT=light npm run sense && cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production BUILD_VARIANT=light npm run post-build && npm run generate-pdf && npm run zip
scripts.pack:prod:airgap: cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production BUILD_VARIANT=full npm run build:dist && cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production BUILD_VARIANT=full npm run sense && cross-env BUILD_TYPE=production BUILD_VARIANT=full npm run post-build && npm run generate-pdf && npm run zip
